name: Oso Grande Auto Sales
description_short: Family-owned used vehicle dealership in San Antonio offering buy-here-pay-here financing with 30-day/1,000-mile warranty on vehicles priced $9,995–$50,000+.
description_long:
Oso Grande Auto Sales is a family-owned used car dealership located at 5407 Interstate 35 Access Rd in San Antonio, Texas. The company has operated for several years with an experienced staff serving the San Antonio area and surrounding communities including Von Ormy, Atascosa, and Somerset. The dealership emphasizes accessibility and customer service as core values, particularly for buyers with limited financing options.

The dealership specializes in used vehicles ranging from 2007 to 2024 model years, with inventory spanning 20+ major manufacturers (Toyota, Ford, Chevrolet, Honda, Nissan, BMW, Lexus, Cadillac, and others) and price points from under $10,000 to $60,000+. Their signature offering is buy-here-pay-here financing, which allows them to provide loans to customers whom traditional lenders may decline. All vehicles sold include a 30-day or 1,000-mile warranty. The dealership claims competitive pricing through "unique connections in the industry" that allow them to acquire vehicles at near-wholesale prices and pass savings to customers.

Oso Grande distinguishes itself through staffing continuity and customer relationship focus. Testimonials highlight individual sales representatives (Mike Farmer, Demarces) and payment department staff (Sylvia) by name, suggesting personalized service. The dealership advertises willingness to work with customers on flexible payment arrangements, including leniency during emergencies. This approach appeals to buyers with imperfect credit or unstable employment who face rejection elsewhere.

A realistic assessment: Oso Grande operates as a legitimate used car retailer, not a predatory lender, but buy-here-pay-here financing inherently carries higher costs and stricter payment enforcement than traditional auto loans. The 30-day warranty is notably short compared to industry standards. Customer testimonials are uniformly positive but undated ("over a year ago"), raising questions about recency. The company's emphasis on flexibility for late payments contradicts typical buy-here-pay-here practices, which often involve vehicle repossession; this claim warrants verification.
address: 5407 Interstate 35 Access Rd, San Antonio, TX 78211

company_info.headquarters: 5407 Interstate 35 Access Rd, San Antonio, TX 78211

pros: Buy-here-pay-here financing available to customers with poor or no credit history
Wide inventory of 100+ vehicle listings across 20+ manufacturers and price range $9,995–$60,000+
30-day or 1,000-mile warranty on all vehicles sold
Claimed wholesale-level pricing passed directly to customers
Named staff (Mike Farmer, Sylvia, Demarces) recognized in customer testimonials for personalized service
Willingness to work with customers on flexible payment arrangements during emergencies
Serves multi-county area including San Antonio, Von Ormy, Atascosa, and Somerset
cons: 30-day/1,000-mile warranty is significantly shorter than many dealership standards
Buy-here-pay-here financing typically involves higher interest rates and stricter payment enforcement than traditional auto loans
All customer testimonials are dated "over a year ago," raising concerns about current service quality
No published interest rates, payment terms, or financing details available on website
Vehicle repossession risk inherent to buy-here-pay-here model not disclosed or addressed
best_for: Used car buyers with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional financing
Customers seeking affordable used vehicles under $15,000 in the San Antonio area
Buyers needing flexible payment arrangements and personal customer service relationships
First-time car buyers or those rebuilding after financial hardship
diagnosis: Oso Grande is best suited for used car buyers in the San Antonio area with limited credit access who need financing flexibility and personalized service. The primary caveat is that buy-here-pay-here financing, while accessible, typically carries higher costs and payment enforcement risk than traditional auto loans; prospective customers should clarify exact APR, payment terms, and repossession policies before committing.
services: Vehicle selection assistance across 100+ inventory units
Online vehicle browsing and filtering by year, make, model, price
